capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a Business Continuity Management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an enterprise business continuity management service exists.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise business continuity management service exists

questions.prompt: Is the Business Continuity Management service reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the BCM service is reviewed on a regular quarterly cadence.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular business continuity management service efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document KPIs and KRIs for the BCP service—including RTO/RPO attainment, exercise completion, and recovery test success?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether BCM KPIs and KRIs are documented with recovery-oriented metrics.
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for the BCP service

questions.prompt: Are the KPIs and KRIs for the BCP service reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether BCM KPIs and KRIs are reviewed on a quarterly cadence.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular KPI/KRI review for the BCP service

questions.prompt: Do you track RTO/RPO attainment and recovery test outcomes as part of BCM metrics?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether RTO, RPO, and recovery test metrics are measured.
questions.evaluation_focus: RTO and RPO attainment metrics

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document business continuity management and operational resilience policies and procedures?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether BCM policies and procedures are formalized and documented.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented business continuity and operational resilience policies and procedures

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise review and update BCM policies and procedures at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether BCM policies and procedures are reviewed quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular review and update of policies and procedures

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have strategies to reduce the impact of, withstand, and recover from business disruptions—including cyber and ransomware events—within risk appetite?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether BCM strategy addresses cyber and ransomware disruption scenarios within risk appetite.
questions.evaluation_focus: Strategies to reduce impact, withstand, and recover from business disruptions within risk appetite

questions.prompt: Is the BCP strategy reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the BCP strategy is reviewed on a quarterly cadence.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular BCP strategy efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document a business continuity plan based on operational resilience strategies and capabilities?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a formal business continuity plan exists based on resilience strategies.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented business continuity plan based on operational resilience strategies and capabilities

questions.prompt: Is the business continuity plan reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the business continuity plan is reviewed quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular review cadence for the business continuity plan

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise exercise and test business continuity and operational resilience plans at least annually or upon significant changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether BCP and operational resilience plans are exercised annually or on change.
questions.evaluation_focus: Annual or change-triggered exercise and testing of business continuity and operational resilience plans

questions.prompt: Are business continuity and operational resilience plans reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether BCP plans are reviewed quarterly for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular review of business continuity and operational resilience plans for efficacy

questions.prompt: Are business continuity and operational resilience plans and processes automated where appropriate?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether BCM plans and processes are automated.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automation of business continuity and operational resilience plans and processes

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have communication plans for stakeholders and participants during business continuity and resilience procedures?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether stakeholder communication plans exist for BCM procedures.
questions.evaluation_focus: Communication with stakeholders and participants during business continuity and resilience procedures

questions.prompt: Are BCM communication plans reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether communication plans are reviewed quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular communication plan efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document a disaster response plan to recover from natural and man-made disasters?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a formal disaster response plan is documented.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented disaster response plan for natural and man-made disasters

questions.prompt: Is the disaster response plan updated at least quarterly or upon significant changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the disaster response plan is updated quarterly or on change.
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular or change-triggered update of the disaster response plan

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise exercise the disaster response plan annually or upon significant changes, including coordination with local emergency authorities where possible?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether disaster response plans are exercised with external coordination where possible.
questions.evaluation_focus: Annual or change-triggered disaster response plan exercise including local emergency authorities where possible

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have documented cyber resilience and ransomware recovery playbooks?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether cyber resilience and ransomware recovery playbooks are documented.
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented cyber resilience and ransomware recovery playbooks

questions.prompt: Do you validate backups and test immutable or isolated recovery paths as part of ransomware preparedness?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether backup validation and immutable recovery testing are performed.
questions.evaluation_focus: Backup validation and immutable recovery testing

questions.prompt: Are cyber recovery procedures reviewed and exercised at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether cyber recovery procedures are reviewed and exercised quarterly.
questions.evaluation_focus: Quarterly review and exercise of cyber recovery procedures

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise supplement business-critical equipment with redundant equipment independently located at a reasonable minimum distance in accordance with applicable industry standards?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether business-critical equipment has geographically separated redundancy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Redundant business-critical equipment independently located at reasonable minimum distance per industry standards
